   • Accommodation: Cityscape Hotel (four-star, central location) at about €150/night. A 5-night stay comes to around €750.
   • Dining: You might enjoy evenings at local tapas bars (costing around €15–€40 per evening) and a couple of meals at a Michelin-recommended restaurant in the city (approximately €40–€70 per meal).
   • Activities: Consider a City Walking Tour for roughly €20 and a Museum Day Pass at around €30.
   
2. Rome, Italy (Fall Option)
   • Flights: Standard airline Economy Class tickets available at approximately €100–€300 per person.
   • Accommodation: Tranquil Inn (three-star, cozy retreat) at about €100/night, totaling €500 for 5 nights.
